Qruise (as in cruise control): The QruiseOS is a collection of algorithms – optimizers, simulators, machine learning tools and other software components designed to accelerate the development of quantum technology and to improve its application.

role_in_text: QruiseML team working on the next major release
occurrence_sentence: As for QruiseML, we've been working very hard on the next
New year, new product update! Towards the end of 2025, the QruiseOS team worked on updates that enhanced performance, usability and stability, with 2026 bringing some workflow viewer improvements.
As for QruiseML, we've been working very hard on the next major release, so we don't have anything for you
We upgraded the workflow engine to use Prefect 3, which mainly allows us to upgrade other dependencies to newer versions and resolve a lot of conflicts.
We added Redis to the stack, which is the first step in bringing a caching and background worker architecture to our solution.
We upgraded the workflow engine to use Prefect 3, which mainly allows us to upgrade other dependencies to newer versions and resolve a lot of conflicts.
Keycloak authentication has been made more robust: we fixed a few bugs causing deadlocks on container startups caused by delayed health checks.
